zh.Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德
zh.Worthing, Broadwater, Sussex, England: 英國素可布洛阿德沃特沃迪
zh.Salisbury, Wiltshire, England: 英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catharine Hungerford於1435年6月10日出生在英國薩默塞特法爾 格福德時，她的父親Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford26歲，母親Margaret Botreaux23歲。她於1451年6月與Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre在英國英格蘭素可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1493年5月12日在英國戴文享年57歲，埋葬在英國戴文普萊姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catharine Hungerford于1435年6月10日出生在英国薩默塞特法爾 格福德时，她的父亲Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford26岁，母亲Margaret Botreaux23岁。她于1451年6月与Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre在英国英格兰素可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1493年5月12日在英国戴文享年57岁，埋葬在英国戴文普萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Hungerford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Hungerford (Berkshire), from Old English hungor ‘hunger’, here probably denoting unproductive land, + ford. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Catharine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catharine Hungerford was born on 10 June 1435, in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, her father, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, was 26 and her mother, Margaret Botreaux, was 23. She married Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre in June 1451, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 May 1493, in Devon, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Plymouth, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catharine Hungerford est née le 10 juin 1435, à Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret Botreaux, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre en juin 1451, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 mai 1493, à Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Plymouth, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catharine Hungerford am 10. Juni 1435 in Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret Botreaux 23. Sie hat im Juni 1451 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Mai 1493 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Devon, England und wurde in Plymouth, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catharine Hungerford è nata il il 10 giugno 1435 nel Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret Botreaux, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre nel giugno 1451, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 maggio 1493, nel Devon, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Plymouth, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catharine Hungerfordが1435年6月10日にイギリスソメルセトファルレイグ ハンジャーフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerfordは26歳，母Margaret Botreauxは23歳であった。1451年6月にイギリスイギリススセックスでRichard West 7th Baron de la Warreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1493年5月12日にイギリスデボンで57歳で死去し，イギリスデボンプリモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catharine Hungerford(이)가 1435년 6월 10일 영국 서머세트 패를리 헌그르퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Botreaux(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1451년 6월 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1493년 5월 12일 영국 데폰에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 플림우스에 묻혔다.

mn.Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, England: Farleigh Hungerford, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.10 June 1435–12 May 1493: 10 de junho de 1435–12 de maio de 1493
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catharine Hungerford nasceu em 10 de junho de 1435, em Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Botreaux, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre em junho de 1451, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de maio de 1493, em Devon, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catharine Hungerford родилась 10 июня 1435 г. в местности фарлиг хунгирфорд, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Botreaux, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre июнь 1451 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 мая 1493 г. в местности девон, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности плимоут, девон, Англия.

es.10 June 1435–12 May 1493: 10 de junio de 1435–12 de mayo de 1493
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catharine Hungerford nació el 10 de junio de 1435, en Farleigh Hungerford, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Hungerford, 2nd Baron Hungerford, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret Botreaux, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Richard West 7th Baron de la Warre en junio de 1451, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de mayo de 1493, en Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Plymouth, Devon, Inglaterra.
